### Test embedded config
1. `go run .. list --embedded-config --config ./config-embedded.test.json --base64-output --edited-order`
	- `../dist/wasm_exec_node.js list --embedded-config --config ./config-embedded.test.json --base64-output --edited-order`
	- `pnpm run twcs list --embedded-config --config ./config-embedded.test.json --base64-output --edited-order`
2. Expected output: ``

### Test list command
1. `go run .. list --config ./config.test.json --base64-output --edited-order`
	- `../dist/wasm_exec_node.js list --config ./config.test.json --base64-output --edited-order`
	- `pnpm run twcs list --config ./config.test.json --base64-output --edited-order`
2. Expected output: ``

### Test files input
1. `go run .. format ./**/*.html`
	- `../dist/wasm_exec_node.js format ./**/*.html`
	- `pnpm run twcs format ./**/*.html`
2. `./test-files ./a/a.html ./a/a.after.txt && ./test-files ./b/b.html ./b/b.after.txt && ./test-files ./c/c.html ./c/c.after.txt`
3. `yes | cp -rf ./a/a.before.txt ./a/a.html && yes | cp -rf ./b/b.before.txt ./b/b.html && yes | cp -rf ./c/c.before.txt ./c/c.html`

### Test file string input
1. `go run .. format --code-ext html --code `
	- `../dist/wasm_exec_node.js format --code-ext html --code ...`
	- `pnpm run twcs format --code-ext html --code ...`
2. Expected output: ``

### Test regions string input
1. `go run .. format --region-input --code-ext html --code `
	- `../dist/wasm_exec_node.js format --region-input --code-ext html --code ...`
	- `pnpm run twcs format --region-input --code-ext html --code ...`
2. Expected output: ``
